findings.title: SQL injection authentication bypass on /rest/user/login
findings.fix: Use parameterised queries / an ORM with bound params; never string-concat user input into SQL. Add server-side input validation and least-privilege DB accounts.

findings.title: Reflected XSS in product search (q parameter)
findings.fix: Context-aware output encoding when rendering user input; a strict Content-Security-Policy; framework auto-escaping. Validate/allow-list the search term server-side.

findings.title: IDOR: read another user's basket via /rest/basket/{id}
findings.fix: Enforce object-level authorization on every request: check the JWT subject owns the resource. Deny by default; centralise access-control checks.

findings.title: Exposed /ftp directory listing leaks backup/config files
findings.fix: Disable directory listing; move secrets/backups out of the web root; restrict static-file routes to an explicit allow-list; harden the default configuration.

findings.title: Forged admin JWT via alg=none / hard-coded weak secret
findings.fix: Pin the accepted algorithm (e.g. RS256) and reject `none`; use a strong, rotated, secret/managed keys; verify signature AND claims (exp, iss, aud) server-side.
